Operation 'createClient' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what a client represents in the loyalty card context, what the operation returns, and its role in the broader workflow. Enhanced version explains the client's purpose, return value, and side effect of establishing a new client record.

data.current_description: Creates a client for a specific card template.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new client for a card template
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new client associated with a specific card template. The client can then be issued digital loyalty cards (passes) based on that template. Returns the created client object with a unique client ID. This operation establishes the client record in the system.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what a client represents in the loyalty card context, what the operation returns, and its role in the broader workflow. Enhanced version explains the client's purpose, return value, and side effect of establishing a new client record.

message: Operation 'updateClient' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are severely lacking in detail. Description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Enhanced version specifies what can be updated, clarifies partial update support, explains the return value, and notes that passes are not affected by client updates. This significantly improves AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing client's information such as contact details, personal information, and preferences. Accepts partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated client object reflecting all changes. The operation modifies the client record in the system without affecting associated passes.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are severely lacking in detail. Description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Enhanced version specifies what can be updated, clarifies partial update support, explains the return value, and notes that passes are not affected by client updates. This significantly improves AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'createPass' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary uses generic term 'card' without domain context. Description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effect of creating a new card instance. Enhanced version uses domain terminology (pass, loyalty card), explains the return value including serial number, and clarifies the operation's effect on system state.

data.current_description: Creates a card of a given template for a specific client.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a digital loyalty card for a client
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new digital loyalty card (pass) based on a specified template and assigns it to a specific client. The card is immediately available for use by the client. Returns the created pass object including the unique serial number and card details. This operation generates a new card instance in the system.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses generic term 'card' without domain context. Description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effect of creating a new card instance. Enhanced version uses domain terminology (pass, loyalty card), explains the return value including serial number, and clarifies the operation's effect on system state.

message: Operation 'getPassInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and identical to summary. Enhanced description explains what information is returned (status, client info, template details, rewards), clarifies that it's a read-only operation, and uses consistent domain terminology (pass).

data.current_summary: Get card information by serial number
data.current_description: Get card information by serial number
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific digital loyalty card (pass) using its unique serial number. Returns the pass object including card status, associated client information, template details, and any accumulated rewards or transaction history. This operation does not modify the card state.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and identical to summary. Enhanced description explains what information is returned (status, client info, template details, rewards), clarifies that it's a read-only operation, and uses consistent domain terminology (pass).

message: Operation 'checkPassExistsByPhone' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear but description is minimal and identical to summary. Enhanced description clarifies the return value (boolean and optional pass details), explains the use case (verification before operations), uses consistent domain terminology (pass), and notes it's read-only. This helps AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Check if a card exists using phone number
data.current_description: Check if a card exists using phone number
data.description_suggestion: Checks whether a digital loyalty card (pass) exists for a client identified by their phone number. Returns a boolean result indicating card existence, and optionally returns the pass details if found. Useful for verifying client enrollment or card status before performing other operations. This is a read-only operation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is minimal and identical to summary. Enhanced description clarifies the return value (boolean and optional pass details), explains the use case (verification before operations), uses consistent domain terminology (pass), and notes it's read-only. message: Operation 'getPassInfoByPhone' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. data.current_description: Send an informational push notification to one or all clients with installed cards.
data.summary_suggestion: Send informational push notification to clients
data.description_suggestion: Sends an informational push notification to one or all clients who have installed passes. Accepts a request specifying the notification content and target audience (specific client or all clients). Returns confirmation of the notification dispatch. Side effects: Clients with installed passes will receive the push notification on their devices.

message: Operation 'getTemplateClientPasses' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. data.current_summary: Get card status information for a template
data.current_description: Get card status information for a template
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve pass status data for template
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated pass status information for all clients associated with a specific template. Accepts a template identifier and returns status metrics for passes created from that template, including counts by status (active, inactive, expired) and other relevant statistics. Useful for monitoring template performance and client engagement across all passes derived from a template.
